name: Mik3Bot
description: A minimal desktop AI assistant powered by Llama API

scripts.postbuild: APP=$(find dist -name '*.app' -maxdepth 3 -print -quit) && APP_NAME=$(basename "$APP") && rm -rf "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && cp -r "$APP" "/Applications/$APP_NAME" && { test ! -e "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && test ! -L "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" && ln -s "/Applications/$APP_NAME" "$HOME/Desktop/$APP_NAME" || true; }

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mik3Bot uses the microphone for voice input via ElevenLabs.
